title: Jade x StarHud Retexture
description: A small pack that re-textures the Jade dark theme overlay to allow it to fit in more with StarHud HUD
body:
##  Jade x StarHud Retexture ##

This is a small pack changing the texture of the jade overlay to fit in with StarHud, As its "Targeted" module isnt as good as Jade.

Simply add this to your resource packs and activate it.

This changes the dark mode texture of Jade, So make sure your theme is set to **dark**:

### Enable Dark Mode 

With Mod Menu and Cloth Config installed go to 

Mods > Jade > Config > Mod Config > Appearance

And set **Theme** to **Dark**

To make this pack fit in more with StarHud set **Transparency** to  **0.7**


### This pack requres Jade: [https://modrinth.com/mod/jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- **Star Hud** [https://modrinth.com/mod/starhud](https://modrinth.com/mod/starhud)
- Mod Menu: [https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- Cloth Config: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
